post.description: Analyzes hotspot trends based on baseline and current time windows.
Analyzes hotspot trends for modules based on baseline and current time windows.
Analyzes the trend of a specific file over time.
Analyzes the trend of modules over time.
Retrieves the historical complexity trend for a specific file.

Retrieves the latest complexity metrics for files combined with a trend indicator
calculated over the specified date range.

Retrieves the latest complexity metrics for modules combined with a trend indicator
calculated over the specified date range.

Retrieves a detailed analysis of commit activity for files, including
commit counts, author metrics, and last modification details.

Retrieves a detailed analysis of commit activity for modules, including
commit counts, author metrics, and last modification details.
Analyzes contributor ownership and concentration at the **file level**.
Analyzes contributor ownership and concentration at the **module level**.
Analyzes Lines of Code (LOC) at the file level.
Analyzes Lines of Code (LOC) at the module level.
Analyzes the total Lines of Code (LOC) for the project.

Analyzes the alignment between modules and teams.
Calculates the ownership ratio of each team for each module based on net LOC changes.
(How much of Module X is owned by Team Y?)

Analyzes the alignment between teams and modules.
Calculates the effort ratio of modules for each team based on net LOC changes.
(How much of Team Y's effort goes into Module X?)
Analyzes the absolute code churn for files within a given time range.
Analyzes the absolute code churn for modules within a given time range.
